2.title: D-Block Activities
2.content: Dance 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: No prior dance experience required. Play (Fall Production) 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: Auditions are held during student orientation for actors. Students interested in stage management and assistant directing must seek prior approval from the Arts Department. Musical (Winter Production) 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: Audition required for actors. Students interested in stage management and assistant directing must seek prior approval from the Arts Department. Theater Showcase 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Student Publications: The Spectator 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Student Publications: GATE 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Yearbook 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Esports 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Math Team 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Model United Nations 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Prereq: Students must complete Intro to Fitness & Strength Training or Compete on a Varsity Team . Pilates 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Yoga 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Swimming for Conditioning 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: Geared towards students that are advanced level swimmers or have completed one year on the varsity swim team. Mad Aquatics 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: Geared toward Varsity level swimmers. Tennis 101 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None . Advanced Tennis 1 per season block(s) . 4.title: English Courses
4.content: English I 3 block(s) . Prereq: None . English II: Literature in the World 3 block(s) . Prereq: English I . English III: American Literature 3 block(s) . Prereq: English I & English II . English IV 3 block(s) . Prereq: English I, English II, and English III . AP English Literature and Composition 2 block(s) . Prereq: Department approval . International Student English Year One (ISE 1) 3 block(s) . Prereq: None . International Student English Year Two (ISE 2) 3 block(s) . Prereq: ISE 1 .

5.title: History Courses
5.content: Comparative Global Studies I 3 block(s) . Prereq: None . Comparative Global Studies II 3 block(s) . Prereq: Comparative Global Studies I. New 10th graders: an equivalent 9th grade history course. U.S. History 4 block(s) . Prereq: Comparative Global Studies II. New 11th graders: an equivalent 10th grade history course. Capstone Seminar: Chocolate City — DC History 2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Capstone Seminar: Global Justice in a World of Difference 2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Capstone Seminar: Middle East in Modern Memory 2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Senior History: Capitalism and Its Critics 1-2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Senior History: Genocide and Moral Duty 1-2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Senior History: Gender, Sex, and Activism 1-2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Senior History: Women, Sports, and American Popular Culture 1-2 block(s) . Prereq: U.S. History . Research Seminar 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Capstone Research Seminar 1 block(s) . Prereq: Capstone Seminar course . Global Youth Leadership Board (Evening) 1 per section block(s) . Prereq: Global Studies II .

6.title: Home
6.content: Hello Snails! Welcome to the Madeira course catalog. Here you can browse the course catalog. Note: some shifts make occur from schoolyear to schoolyear; always verify with your academic dean.

7.title: Language Courses
7.content: Student Life 2 block(s) . Prereq: None . Design Thinking Lab 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Mindfulness and the Brain 1 block(s) . Prereq: None .

8.title: Mathematics Courses
8.content: Algebra I 3 block(s) . Prereq: None . Geometry 3 block(s) . Prereq: Returning students—Algebra I; New students—by placement test . Algebra II 3-4 block(s) . Prereq: Returning Students – B+ or higher in Geometry leads to 3 Mods of Algebra II. New Students - by placement test. Extended Algebra II 3 block(s) . Prereq: Returning Students - Geometry A or higher and department approval. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval. Precalculus 3 block(s) . Prereq: Returning Students - Algebra II with a B-. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval. Extended Precalculus 3 block(s) . Prereq: Returning Students – Extended Algebra II with an A and department approval. Algebra II students with an A or above, and department approval. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval. Calculus 3 block(s) . Prereq: Returning Students - Trigonometry, Precalculus with a B- or higher, or Extended Precalculus. New Students - by placement test and the Academic Dean and Math Department Chair's approval. AP Calculus AB 3 block(s) . Prereq: Extended Precalculus with a B or higher, Precalculus with an A or higher, or Calculus, and department approval. AP Calculus BC 3-4 block(s) . Prereq: Extended Precalculus with an A or higher, AP Calculus AB with a B or higher, and department approval. Students who complete AP Calculus AB prior to taking this course may elect not to take the first block of BC. Multivariable Calculus 3 block(s) . Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher. Linear Algebra 3 block(s) . Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher. Differential Equations 3 block(s) . Prereq: AP Calculus BC or AP Calculus AB with a B+ or higher . Computer Science I 1 block(s) . Prereq: Algebra I . Computer Science II 1 block(s) . Prereq: Computer Science 1 or Placement test. Computer Science III 1 block(s) . Prereq: Computer Science 2 or Placement test. Computer Science Seminar 1 block(s) . Prereq: Computer Science 3. Engineering for Robotics 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Programming for Robotics 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Statistics: Data and Display 1 block(s) . Prereq: Algebra II . Statistics: Probability 1 block(s) . Prereq: Algebra II . Data Science 1 block(s) . Prereq: Statistics: Data & Display or Computer Science I . Advanced Statistics 3 block(s) . Prereq: Extended Algebra II, or Precalculus, or department approval. Applied Mathematics: Personal Finance 1 block(s) . Prereq: Algebra II . Applied Mathematics: Financial Mathematics 1 block(s) . Prereq: Algebra II . Robotics (Evening) 1 per season block(s) . Prereq: None .

9.title: Science Courses
9.content: Biology 3 block(s) . Prereq: None . Applied Chemistry 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology. Chemistry 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology and B+ or Higher in Geometry or Applied Physics. Applied Physics 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology. Physics 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology, Chemistry with a B– or higher. AP Biology 3 block(s) . Prereq: Applied Chemistry or Chemistry, B- or Higher in Biology. AP Chemistry 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology, A- (or higher) in Chemistry, B+ (or higher) in Physics. AP Physics C: Mechanics 3 block(s) . Prereq: Biology, Chemistry and Physics . Environmental Science: Field Ecology 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Environmental Science: Citizen Science 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Environmental Science: Contemporary Issues 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Forensic Science 1-2 block(s) . Prereq: None . Kinesiology: Functional Human Movement 1 block(s) . Prereq: Biology. Marine Ecology 1 block(s) . Prereq: Biology . Marine Environmental Issues 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Bioorganic Chemistry 1 block(s) . Prereq: Biology and Chemistry . Psychology of Sport 1 block(s) . Prereq: Must be competing/practicing on a Junior Varsity or Varsity athletic team at Madeira. Engineering for Robotics 1 block(s) . Prereq: None . Programming for Robotics 1 block(s) . Prereq: None .
